name: ITOps-Toolkit
problem: Daily IT operations often require quick utilities such as password generation, IP lookup, and small diagnostics. Public websites can be ad-heavy, inconsistent, or unclear about whether pasted data is read or stored.
architecture: Personal Python toolkit for local-first IT operations tasks. The app is designed to grow feature-by-feature from real work scenarios, keeping common checks and helpers in a trusted utility instead of relying on random external sites.
impact: Provides a trusted place for repeatable IT support helpers and creates a foundation for future MSP runbook and diagnostics automation.
tradeOffs: Started with practical daily-use utilities instead of a broad platform so features can be added only when real work creates the need.
Local-first design favors privacy and control for sensitive lookups or generated values.

name: n8n Community Node: text.lk SMS
problem: Required reliable SMS notifications for a billing-related project in Sri Lanka, but n8n lacked a native SMS integration suitable for local providers.
architecture: Designed and developed a custom n8n community node (n8n-nodes-textdotlk) that wraps the text.lk SMS API, enabling dynamic SMS delivery to any phone number directly within n8n workflows without relying on repeated custom HTTP nodes.
impact: Enabled automated billing and notification workflows using a local Sri Lankan SMS provider; reduced workflow complexity and improved reusability.
tradeOffs: Scoped initial release to sending SMS; future work can add delivery status callbacks.
Published as a community node to keep reuse simple without bundling into larger playbooks.

name: npfernando-portfolio
problem: Needed a personal site for achievements and project showcase.
architecture: Static-first, Azure-optimized portfolio built with React, Vite, and TypeScript. Content is typed and validated with Zod, styled with Tailwind CSS, and wired for GitHub + Azure Static Web Apps CI/CD.
tradeOffs: Static-first approach favors performance; dynamic data (GitHub) is client-fetched.
